title: Prohibition & Restrictions - Import of books entitled ENCYCLOPEDIA BRITANNICA 1994 - published by Encyclopedia Britannica Inc., U.K., imported by M/s. Jaico Publishing House, Bombay - containing incorrect map of India - Circular No.5/1995-Customs, dated 18.1.95
description: Prohibition & Restrictions - Import of books entitled ENCYCLOPEDIA BRITANNICA 1994 - published by Encyclopedia Britannica Inc., U.K., imported by M/s. Jaico Publishing House, Bombay - containing incorrect map of India - Circular No.5/1995-Customs, dated 18.1.95
text: Circular No. 5/95-Cus. dated 18/1/95 F.No. 402/24/94-CUS.III Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue, New Delhi Subject : Prohibition & Restrictions - Import of books entitled "ENCYCLOPEDIA BRITANNICA 1994" - published by Encyclopedia Britannica Inc., U.K., imported by M/s. Jaico Publishing House, Bombay - containing incorrect map of India - Ins. reg. I am directed to say that it has been decided in consultation with Ministry of Home Affairs that the above mentioned book, containing some of the incorrect maps, wherein Jammu & Kashmir and Arunachal Pradesh are shown "Occupied by India", should not be allowed entry into India under the provisions or the Notification No. 19-Cus. dated 6th March, 1976. This is for your kind information and suitable action. Please acknowledge the receipt. Sd/- (S.M. Bhatnagar) Under Secretary to the Govt. of India -- 1 of 1 --
